tool.name: RGI: Install CARD database
tool.description: download and index a CARD release for use with RGI tools

param.name: card_url
param.label: CARD download URL
param.help: URL to the CARD data archive (card-data.tar.bz2). The default fetches the latest release. For a specific version use the versioned URL from https://card.mcmaster.ca/download.

param.name: card_archive
param.label: CARD archive (card-data.tar.bz2)
param.help: A previously downloaded card-data.tar.bz2 from https://card.mcmaster.ca/download.

tool.help:
**RGI: Install CARD database**
Downloads a CARD (Comprehensive Antibiotic Resistance Database) release, extracts ``card.json``, and runs ``rgi card_annotation`` to generate the annotation FASTAs required by the RGI tools. The database is registered in the ``rgi_card`` data table so users can select it from the pre-installed database dropdown in **RGI main** and **RGI bwt**.
The CARD version is read automatically from ``card.json`` — no manual version entry is required.
-----
**URL format**
- Latest release: ``https://card.mcmaster.ca/latest/data`` - Specific version: use the download URL from https://card.mcmaster.ca/download
-----
**After installation**
Both the homolog-models-only FASTA (``card_database_v*.fasta``) and the all-models FASTA (``card_database_v*_all.fasta``) are stored. Users can select the annotation type when running the RGI tool suite.
